summary: Comprehensive audit testing of School Management System completed. All 25 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Security, RBAC, business logic, and UI features verified.

features_tested.feature: Public registration - only parent role allowed
features_tested.details: Registration correctly rejects admin/teacher/student/accountant roles with 403, only accepts parent
Admin can create teacher/student/accountant accounts. Non-admin (teacher) gets 403
Admin sees Add Student/Bulk Upload buttons. Teacher does NOT see these buttons

features_tested.feature: Users page - Create User button for admin
features_tested.details: Admin can see Create User button on Users page
marks_obtained > max_marks is correctly rejected with error
Re-submitting same student/subject/exam/term updates existing record instead of creating duplicate
Teacher dashboard returns assigned_classes computed from DB (not hardcoded '3')
/api/users/search endpoint exists and returns user_id, name, email, role
Message compose form shows 'Search User' field instead of raw 'User ID' input
Parent only sees 'Specific User' option, no broadcast options (Everyone, All Teachers, All Students, All Parents)
Admin can send to recipient_type='all' without 403
Parent gets 403 when trying to send to all/student/parent recipient types
/api/fees/generate-pending endpoint exists, requires class_name, visible in UI
Teacher gets 403 when trying to POST /api/students. Admin can create students
Registration page shows 'Parent Account' text instead of role dropdown
Generate Dues button visible on Fees page for admin

critical_code_review_comments: Registration security properly enforced: only 'parent' role accepted in public registration endpoint
Role-based access control implemented correctly: admin can create users, teacher cannot
Marks validation logic is robust: rejects exceeding marks, negative marks, zero max_marks
Upsert pattern implemented for marks to prevent duplicates
Message role restrictions work correctly: parents/students cannot broadcast
seed_data_creation: Test created users with TEST_ prefix for marks upsert testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete audit testing done. All security features (registration restriction, RBAC, marks validation, fee access control, message restrictions) are working correctly. Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_audit_features.py can be reused for regression testing. Stripe payment and SendGrid email are MOCKED.
